items.title_en: South Carolina Supreme Court overturns Alex Murdaugh’s murder convictions in deaths of wife and son
items.title_zh: 南卡罗来纳州最高法院推翻了亚历克斯·默多（Alex Murdaugh）谋杀妻子和儿子的定罪
items.desc_en: The ruling is a win for Murdaugh, who has adamantly denied killing his wife Maggie and younger son Paul since he found their bodies outside their home in 2021.
items.desc_zh: 这项裁决对默多来说是一次胜利，自从 2021 年在自家门外发现妻子玛吉和小儿子保罗的尸体以来，默多一直坚决否认杀害了他们。

items.title_en: Court overturns Alex Murdaugh's murder convictions and orders new trial

items.title_en: Thousands of Waymo robotaxis recalled over risk of entering flooded roads

items.desc_zh: 此次自愿召回是在 4 月 20 日发生的一起事件之后发生的，当时一辆空的 Waymo 汽车进入德克萨斯州圣安东尼奥市一条被洪水淹没的道路。

items.title_en: Alibaba's core profit plunges 84% even as AI and cloud growth accelerate
items.title_zh: 尽管人工智能和云计算加速增长，阿里巴巴核心利润仍暴跌84%

items.desc_zh: 阿里巴巴周三表示，由于对科技和电子商务的大量投资，其核心盈利能力在三月份季度大幅下降。
